title: Overseer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Overseer''' was a title given by different organizations and cultures to their leaders or caremasters:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Overseer]]''', a position in various governments and organizations
*[[Overseer (Imperial-class)|'''''Overseer''''']], an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served as the [[flagship]] of [[Titan Squadron]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Overseer/Legends|Overseer]]''', a position in various governments and organizations
*'''[[Overseer (GenoHaradan)|Overseer]]''' was the title given to four leaders of the [[GenoHaradan]], a secret society of elite [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].
*'''[[Overseer (Crucible)|Overseer]]''' was the title given to the slave duel supervisors in [[The Crucible]] slaving organization.
*'''[[Overseer (Sith)|Overseer]]''' was the title given to a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] instructor of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] era.
*The '''[[Overseer (droid)|Overseer]]''' was the name of a [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Rakatan guardian droid|guardian droid]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] created during the time of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]].
*The '''''[[Overseer (Acclamator-class)|Overseer]]''''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]].
*[[Saquesh]], the leader of the [[Exchange]] in the [[Refugee Sector]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] in the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]], was often referred to by refugees as the '''Overseer'''.
*[[Overseer (Pentastar Alignment)|'''Overseer''']], a rank in the [[Pentastar Alignment]].

{{Disambig}}
